description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the suede effect fabric with studs will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 27cmWidth: 31cmDepth: 7cmMade of synthetic leather with synthetic suede flap with magnet closure and stud and strap decorationHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pocket and organiser pouchesOne shoulder strap with buckle to adjust lengthZip pocket on backBag fabric gathered to sides with buckled strapsCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
